title: All The Potions
description: Adds a potion for (almost) all of the effects in the game and allows you to mix them.
body: # All The Potions A mod that adds a potion for (almost) all of the effects in the game and allows you to mix them. Mixing is done simply by combining potions of the same type (regular, splash, lingering) on the crafting table or survival crafting menu. ![All recipes in the mod](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/47c30e6c990be144c15e971b38d3a398a44ae8ad.png)
